ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pet in years */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pet (M/F) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the pet */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Temperament of the pet (e.g., friendly, loyal) */,
  "hungry" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pet is hungry (true/false) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the pet */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for microchipped pets */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pet is spayed or neutered */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special needs or requirements the pet may have */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Current adoption status (e.g., available, pending, adopted) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., up-to-date, incomplete) */,
  "adoption_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with adopting the pet */,
  "date_entered_shelter" TEXT /* Date the pet entered the shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adopters" (
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adopter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the adopter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the adopter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adopter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "adoption_history" TEXT /* History of adoptions by this adopter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the adopter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the adopter */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the adopter */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the adopter */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for future adoptions (e.g., breed, age) */,
  "adoption_fee_waived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the adoption fee has been waived */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or recommendation for the adopter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., caretaker, manager) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the staff member */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the volunteer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Days available for volunteering */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the volunteer joined the shelter */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the volunteer */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills and expertise of the volunteer */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption request */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter making the request */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being requested for adoption */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., adoption, foster) */,
  "meeting_scheduled" INTEGER /* Indicates if a meeting has been scheduled */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of the scheduled meeting */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member handling the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_requests_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_requests_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_requests_adopter_id FOREIGN KEY ("adopter_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply item */,
  "supply_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in inventory */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the supply item */,
  "last_ordered" TEXT /* Date when the supply was last ordered */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the supply item */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the supply item */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the supply item */,
  "last_received" TEXT /* Date the supply was last received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., medical, supplies, food) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor from whom the expense was incurred */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the expense */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_behavior_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior log entry */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being logged */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member logging the behavior */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the pet's behavior */,
  "training_session" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log is related to a training session */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., obedience, agility) */,
  "health_check" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log is related to a health check */,
  "health_issue" TEXT /* Specific health issue noted (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_behavior_logs_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_behavior_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_adoption_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption history record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet being adopted */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter who adopted the pet */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of the adoption */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adoption (e.g., successful, returned) */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the pet being returned (if applicable) */,
  "adopter_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the adopter about the pet */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up with the adopter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_adoption_history_adopter_id FOREIGN KEY ("adopter_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_adoption_history_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled shift */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift time (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the staff member is scheduled to work */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions for the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_schedules_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
